name: Zesty Coconut Cream Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Coco Lopez cream of coconut
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small jar with a tight-fitting lid or bowl, combine the ingredients.
2. Mix well until blended.
3. Chill to allow flavors to meld.
4. Stir before serving.
5. Serve with tossed green salads, fruit salads, or coleslaw.
6. Refrigerate any leftovers.
